_doc: Capability traits as composable mixins. Each persona declares traits[]; contract-load resolves the union/intersection per _axis_direction. Authoritative capability source = the persona's agents/<name>.md `tools:` frontmatter ([Read,Grep,Glob]=read-only; +Bash=subprocess; +Edit/Write=writes). Traits are atomic: one capability axis concern each (single-responsibility). Composition conflict rules per RFC v3.3 §3.2 L169-172: narrowing axes intersect (tightest wins), broadening axes union (widest wins), same-direction same-axis hard-conflict = contract-load-time error.

read_repo._doc: Baseline read capability for every actor — maps to the [Read,Grep,Glob] tool floor present in ALL 18 personas. Broadening axis. Every persona composes this.

recall_global._doc: Cross-run recall of library + thoughts artifacts (RFC v3.3 §3.2 L163). Broadening axis. Granted to personas whose work spans prior-run context (builders, challenger, honesty-auditor).

worktree_writable._doc: Sandbox-scoped write + worktree isolation (RFC v3.3 §3.2 L161). The ONLY runtime-enforced capability (Anthropic worktree filesystem scope). Narrowing axes (write paths intersect, isolation intersects). Granted ONLY to personas whose agent.md tools include Edit/Write. The isolation+write coupling is INTENTIONAL cohesion (one reason-to-change = the Anthropic worktree filesystem scope): sandbox-write is only meaningful within worktree isolation and no persona wants either axis without the other, so do NOT split into isolation_worktree + write_sandbox.

bash_test_runner._doc: Scoped subprocess whitelist for test/build commands (RFC v3.3 §3.2 L162). Narrowing axis (subprocess whitelists intersect). Granted to personas whose agent.md tools include Bash.

network_anthropic._doc: Explicit network allowlist for Anthropic inference API (RFC v3.3 §3.2 L162). Narrowing axis (allowlists intersect). Advisory enforcement only: tool-mediated egress (WebFetch/WebSearch/MCP) is harness-enforced via agents/<name>.md `tools:`; Bash-subprocess egress is audited post-hoc (advisory) by packages/kernel/observability/network-egress-audit.js on PostToolUse:Bash. NOT blockable mid-spawn; real prevention is ContainerAdapter-tier. Granted only when the persona's agent.md description implies inference-API consumption (e.g. 08-ml-engineer Claude/OpenAI integration).
